---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels:
  - enhancement
assignees:
  - sobird
---

## Feature Description
Please describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see in detail.

## Use Cases
Describe when this feature would be used and what problem it solves.

## Expected Behavior
What should the behavior be when this feature is implemented?

## Alternative Solutions
If there are other ways to implement this, please describe them.

## Technical Considerations
Any technical implementation details or challenges.

## Priority
- [ ] High (must have)
- [ ] Medium (important)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Related Issues
Reference any related issues if applicable.
